locations.label: Peripheral
locations.summary: No central airway or invasion feature selected.

locations.label: Central/main bronchus
locations.summary: Main bronchus involvement without carina is a T2a feature.

locations.label: Visceral pleural
locations.summary: Visceral pleural invasion is a T2a feature.

locations.label: Mediastinal
locations.summary: Mediastinal or selected organ invasion can make the tumor T4.

locations.label: Diaphragmatic
locations.summary: Diaphragm invasion is a T4 feature.

invasionRules.label: Visceral pleura
invasionRules.summary: Invasion beyond the elastic layer to visceral pleura is a T2 feature.

invasionRules.label: Main bronchus without carina
invasionRules.summary: Main bronchus involvement up to but not including the carina is T2a.

invasionRules.label: Adjacent lobe by direct invasion
invasionRules.summary: Direct invasion across or through a fissure is T2a unless another feature is higher.

invasionRules.label: Parietal pleura/chest wall
invasionRules.summary: Parietal pleural or chest wall invasion is T3.

invasionRules.label: Pericardium, phrenic nerve, or azygos
invasionRules.summary: These selected local invasion findings are T3.

invasionRules.label: Mediastinum/trachea/carina/esophagus
invasionRules.summary: Invasion of major mediastinal structures is T4.

invasionRules.label: Diaphragm
invasionRules.summary: Diaphragm invasion is T4 in the 9th-edition descriptor set.

invasionRules.label: Heart or great vessel
invasionRules.summary: Heart, great vessel, and major thoracic vessel invasion are T4 features.

separateNoduleRules.label: No separate nodule
separateNoduleRules.summary: T is driven by size and invasion features.

separateNoduleRules.label: Same lobe
separateNoduleRules.summary: Separate tumor nodules in the same lobe as the primary are T3.

separateNoduleRules.label: Different ipsilateral lobe
separateNoduleRules.summary: Separate tumor nodules in a different ipsilateral lobe are T4.

separateNoduleRules.label: Contralateral lung
separateNoduleRules.summary: A separate tumor nodule in the contralateral lung is M1a rather than a higher T descriptor.

atelectasisNote: Atelectasis or obstructive pneumonitis extending to the hilar region remains a T2 feature. In this module it raises a small tumor to T2a, but it does not outrank a larger size category or a T3/T4 invasion feature.
